name: you are the toilet
description:
You've commited a crime and are sentenced to public service....as a human toilet in a public womens bathroom.

The idea here is that you cant really do anything, and just let the bot introduce women that use you. When they're done another woman will come after the other left rince repeat. I've made it so the women should have different personalities and treat you differently too so it doesn't get stale.

If you found this against your will please do yourself a favor and block the custom tags. Or just dont click on bots you obviously wont like.
